zh.St Edmund's chapel in Westminster Abbey,: 英國英格蘭米德萊可頓聖 埃德蒙 本 康特波也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Humphrey Bourchier於1435年6月1日出生在英國艾可哈爾斯亞德時，他的父親Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners20歲，母親Margery Berners17歲。他於大約1466年與Elizabeth Tilney結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1456年被列為constable of hottingham castlet。他去世於1471年4月14日在英國賀特福爾巴內特享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可頓聖 埃德蒙 本 康特波也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Humphrey Bourchier于1435年6月1日出生在英国艾可哈爾斯亞德时，他的父亲Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners20岁，母亲Margery Berners17岁。他于大约1466年与Elizabeth Tilney结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1456年被列为constable of hottingham castlet。他去世于1471年4月14日在英国賀特福爾巴內特享年35岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可頓聖 埃德蒙 本 康特波也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Bourchier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: perhaps a variant of   Burcher   (  see  Bircher  ). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2). The name has sometimes been altered to or confused with   Bouchier   and   Boucher  .

2 Norman, English: locative name of uncertain origin but it is presumably from a French place-name, perhaps Boursières in Haute-Saône. The name was early confused with other surnames and may survive in Bouchier, Bowcher, Bowser, and Boozer . The surname gave rise to a number of minor place-names in Essex: Bourchier’s alias Bouchier’s Hall in Aldham, Bourchier’s Hall in Messing; Bouchier’s Grange in Great Coggeshall, Bouchiers Chapel in Tollesbury, Boarstye Fm and Bowser’s Hall in Rivenhall (Essex), and Boose’s Green in Colne Engayne.

variants.name: Bourcier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Lucien, Armand, Emile.
French: variant of   Boursier   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
History: The (majority of the) American bearers of the surname Bourcier are descendants of Jean Boursier dit Lavigne from France (see Boursier ).

variants.name: Bircher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Albrecht, Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ulrich.
South German and Swiss German: topographic name for someone who lived by a birch tree or in a birch wood, from Middle High German birche ‘birch’ + the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant.
English: habitational name from Birchover in Derbyshire or Bircher in Hereford, both named as from Old English birce ‘birch’ + ofer ‘ridge’.

variants.name: Bouchier
meanings: 1  English: variant of   Butcher  .
2  English: alternatively a variant of   Belcher  .
3  Norman, English: possibly a variant of   Bourchier   (2).

variants.name: Bowser
meanings: English: nickname from either from Old French beu cher ‘good company’, or from Old French beu sire ‘fair sir’ (see Belcher ), given either to a fine gentleman (perhaps ironically), or to someone who made frequent use of this term of address. Compare Bonser and Boozer .
English: variant of   Bolsover  .
Americanized form of German   Bauser  .

variants.name: Boozer
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German   Buser  .
English (Kent): variant of   Bowser   1.

variants.name: Burcher
meanings: English: variant of   Bircher  .

variants.name: Boucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Laurent, Alcide.

French: occupational name for a butcher or slaughterer, from Old French bouchier, a derivative of bouc ‘ram’. Compare Bouche 2, Bouchey , Bouchie , Boushey , Boushie , Bush 5, Busha 1, Busher , and Bushey 3.
English: variant of   Butcher  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Borger
meanings: North German (also Börger) and Dutch: variant of Burger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname from Yiddish borger ‘borrower’ or ‘lender’.
Norwegian and Swedish: habitational name for someone from a place called Borg (see   Borg  ), or a topographic name for someone living by a fortification or near a hill resembling a fortification.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Humphrey Bourchier was born on 1 June 1435, in Halstead, Essex, England, his father, Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners, was 20 and his mother, Margery Berners, was 17. He married Elizabeth Tilney about 1466. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1456, at the age of 21, his occupation is listed as constable of hottingham castlet. He died on 14 April 1471, in Barnet, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in St Edmund of Canterbury's Church, Whitton, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Humphrey Bourchier est né le 1 juin 1435, à Halstead, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margery Berners, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Tilney environ 1466. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1456, à l’âge de 21 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of hottingham castlet. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1471, à Barnet, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à St Edmund of Canterbury's Church, Whitton, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Humphrey Bourchier am 1. Juni 1435 in Halstead, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners 20 und seine Mutter Margery Berners 17. Er hat um 1466 Elizabeth Tilney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1456, als er 21 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of hottingham castlet aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. April 1471 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Barnet, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in St Edmund of Canterbury's Church, Whitton, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Tilney circa 1466. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1456, all'età di 21 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of hottingham castlet. Morì il 14 aprile 1471, nel Barnet, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a St Edmund of Canterbury's Church, Whitton, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.St Edmund's chapel in Westminster Abbey,: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 휘턴 스트 에드먼드 프 캉르버이'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Bourchier(이)가 1435년 6월 1일 영국 에세스 할스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Berners(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1466년 Elizabeth Tilney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1456년, 21세의 나이로 그의 직업은 constable of hottingham castlet이었다. 그는 1471년 4월 14일 영국 허트퍼드실르 바른에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 휘턴 스트 에드먼드 프 캉르버이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Bourchier nasceu em 1 de junho de 1435, em Halstead, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margery Berners, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Tilney aproximadamente 1466. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1456, com 21 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of hottingham castlet. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1471, em Barnet, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em St Edmund of Canterbury's Church, Whitton, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Humphrey Bourchier родился 1 июня 1435 г. в местности холстид, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Berners, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Tilney около 1466 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1456 году, в возрасте 21 год,  он работал по профессии constable of hottingham castlet. Он умер 14 апреля 1471 г. в местности барнет, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности ст эдмунд оф кантирбури'с чурч, уиттон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.
